Accepting paymentsOnline accountingGovernment services

Deposit “Daily” for individual entrepreneurs and legal entities — earn income every day!

No restrictions on the amount, term, replenishment and withdrawal. Open and manage online 24/7 via MBusiness.

Advantages of the "Daily" deposit

Daily payments

Interest is charged and paid to the current account every day

Favorable interest

8% annual interest – your money works while you rest!

Flexibility

Replenishment and withdrawal of any amount without restrictions and without loss of interest

Online

No more visits to office. Managing a deposit online 24/7 in MBusiness application

How it works?

1

Opening and replenishment online

Open and replenish accumulative online deposit in MBusiness from your IP account for any amount. Interest will be paid daily to this account

2

Daily interest payment

Interest is charged and paid daily - on the amount that was on deposit at 23:59 of the previous day. You can withdraw funds from your online deposit on business days

3

Your money works

With accumulative online deposit in MBusiness, your money works every day. By putting the proceeds on the online deposit even for 2 days, you will already receive income!

Open a deposit and start earning income!

Use your money during the day — for business, shopping, and payments. And in the evening, replenish your account again and earn income! With the 'Daily' deposit, your money works for you without limits!

Open an account with MBusiness online in just 1 minute

Online banking for entrepreneurs who value their time

MBusiness is your friend and assistant in running a business

We help save time. Focus on what matters, leave the rest to MBusiness.

Accept payments via QR

Payments via MBANK and any other applications

Transfers to MBANK

Free and fast from a current or card account

Free and fast from a current or card account

For account replenishment, cash withdrawals and payments for goods and services for business

Unlimited payments and transfers

Gross, clearing, SWIFT to other countries worldwide

Currency exchange

Conversion at a favorable rate

Receiving a statement

Online in MBusiness app and directly in 1С
